class.name: GaussianMemoryStream
class.brief_description: Triple-buffered GPU memory stream for asynchronous Gaussian splat data uploads.
class.description: GaussianMemoryStream manages the GPU-side memory pipeline for Gaussian splat rendering. It implements a triple-buffering scheme that overlaps data upload with rendering, targeting less than 5% GPU stall rates on modern hardware. The stream maintains an internal memory pool with suballocation, defragmentation, and bandwidth monitoring. It supports both asynchronous and immediate upload paths, and tracks detailed statistics including bytes transferred, stall counts, and spherical harmonics compression ratios. Initialize with a [RenderingDevice] reference, then use [method swap_buffers] each frame to rotate the triple buffer. The [GaussianStreamingSystem] typically drives this class; direct usage is needed only for custom streaming pipelines.

method.name: initialize
method.description: Initializes the memory stream with the given [RenderingDevice], maximum Gaussian capacity, and memory pool budget in megabytes. Creates the triple-buffer set and internal memory pool. Returns [constant OK] on success.

method.name: shutdown
method.description: Waits for all pending uploads and releases all GPU buffers and pool memory. Call before discarding this stream.

method.name: get_current_gpu_buffer
method.description: Returns the [RID] of the GPU buffer that is currently ready for rendering.

method.name: swap_buffers
method.description: Rotates the triple buffer, advancing the write buffer and making the most recently uploaded buffer available for rendering. Call once per frame.

method.name: is_upload_complete
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if all pending asynchronous uploads have finished.

method.name: wait_for_all_uploads
method.description: Blocks the calling thread until all pending GPU uploads have completed. Use sparingly to avoid stalling the render thread.

method.name: compact_memory
method.description: Compacts the internal memory pool by releasing unused blocks and merging adjacent free regions.

method.name: get_allocated_memory_mb
method.description: Returns the total allocated GPU memory in megabytes, including free pool space.

method.name: get_used_memory_mb
method.description: Returns the actively used GPU memory in megabytes.

method.name: get_memory_efficiency
method.description: Returns the memory efficiency ratio (used / allocated) as a value between [code]0.0[/code] and [code]1.0[/code]. Values below [code]0.7[/code] may indicate fragmentation.

method.name: get_task_debug_state
method.description: Returns a dictionary containing buffer state details, fence values, and upload progress for debugging purposes.
